name: Build Role — Goal-Recipe Refusal
description: Evaluates whether the Build role refuses a brief whose pillar plan provides no usable goal recipe, emitting one of the equally-correct unusable-recipe codes (goal_recipe_empty or missing_goal_recipe) instead of inventing a recipe.
needs_llm: Validating the goal recipe, recognizing it is unusable, and refusing without fabricating one is the Build role's gate behavior.

eval_cases.provenance: WORKFLOW.md §3 + §4.4 (Build goal-recipe gate — goal_recipe_empty / missing_goal_recipe, equally-correct OR-group); pillar docs/plans/pillars/fixture-build-empty-recipe.md (no usable goal_recipe); idc:build

parts.text: Implement this Build brief from docs/plans/pillars/fixture-build-empty-recipe.md (add GET /healthz at services/api/app/routes/healthz.py). Validate the goal recipe first and tell me whether you can proceed to the TDD plan.

rubric.criterion: Emits one of the equally-correct unusable-goal-recipe refusal codes (goal_recipe_empty or missing_goal_recipe) and refuses rather than inventing a recipe
